title: Ο περί Απασχολήσεως Γυναικών εν Μεταλλείοις Νόμος (ΚΕΦ.181)

provisions.title: Άρθρο 1: Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Law may be cited as the Employment of Women (in Mines) Law.

provisions.title: Άρθρο 2: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. In this Law-
"mine" includes any undertaking, whether public or private, for the extraction of any substance from under the surface of the earth.

provisions.title: Άρθρο 3: Prohibition of employment of women on underground work in mines
Άρθρο 4: Penalties
provisions.content: 4. Any person being the proprietor, owner or manager of any mine in which any female is employed in contravention of this Law shall be guilty of an offence and shall be liable to a fine of (50 for every female so employed.
